name: 警员
face_geometry: standard oval face with balanced proportions avoiding narrow length or blunt roundness
hair_silhouette: short practical black hair cropped evenly above ears and neckline
body_frame: medium build with neutral straight shoulders and even torso width
wardrobe_signature: dark police uniform jacket over shirt for urban scene control
proportion_contract: adult proportion 1:8 head-to-body ratio with balanced limb lengths
pairwise_forbidden_similarity: 'avoid slim upright build with straight shoulders'
'avoid short black hair neatly combed back'
'avoid dark worn suit with white shirt and subtle tie'
'avoid restrained posture with controlled movements'
'avoid mild eyes with piercing insight']
'vs_RYUZAKI_RIVAL': ['avoid wide or square face with heavy jaw'
'avoid broad shoulders'
'avoid short oily black hair slicked back'
'avoid tailored dark business suit'
'avoid forward-leaning seated posture with tense finger interlacing'
'avoid squinted eyes and defensive mouth']
'vs_KENICHI_MAIN': ['avoid round or slightly wide blunt face with soft jaw'
'avoid slightly slumped shoulders'
'avoid short black hair slightly disheveled'
'avoid gray or navy business suit with wrinkled shirt and loose tie'
'avoid fatigued standing posture with awkward hand gestures'
'avoid tired under-eyes and pressure lines']
'vs_MISAKI_FEMALE': ['avoid oval or small heart-shaped face with soft chin'
'avoid tense shoulders and neck'
'avoid black medium-long straight hair or low ponytail'
'avoid subdued everyday clothing in low-saturation tones'
'avoid restrained standing posture with guarded hand tension'
'avoid alert averted eyes with minimal makeup']}

appearance.face_shape: standard oval with even cheekbones and jawline
appearance.facial_features: medium-set eyes with straight brows, straight nose, thin lips in neutral line
appearance.hair: short practical black hair, evenly cropped, no styling gel or part
appearance.skin: smooth fair Japanese skin tone with no blemishes or heavy makeup
appearance.body: medium athletic build, 170-180cm height, neutral posture with hands at sides
appearance.expression: professional neutral with direct gaze and relaxed mouth

costume.fixed_outfit: dark blue police uniform jacket with badge, white collared shirt, black trousers, black shoes
costume.colors: dark blue dominant, white accents, black neutrals
costume.materials: wool-blend jacket, cotton shirt, polyester trousers, leather shoes
costume.wardrobe_continuity: consistent dark uniform across scenes, no variations in cut or accessories

distinction_anchors: dark uniform or casual jacket for scene control
警员有可执行的脸型骨相，与其他角色明显不同
正常真人头身比，体态符合年龄
固定服装来自角色设定，同一集内不换装

portrait_prompt: Portrait of a generic Japanese urban police officer in 20s-40s, standard oval face with balanced features, short practical black hair, medium build, wearing dark blue police uniform jacket with badge over white shirt, professional neutral expression, modern Japanese city background, realistic style, no extremes in features or posture。比例契约：adult proportion 1:8 head-to-body ratio with balanced limb lengths
